scripts.check: bun run typecheck && bun run lint && bun run test
scripts.check:fast: bun run typecheck && bun run lint && bun run test:unit:fast
scripts.db:board:sync-fn: bun packages/server/src/cli/generate.ts --registry packages/board-schema/src/registry.ts --export boardSyncRegistry --project-dir . --config infra/board-drizzle.config.ts --name board_sync_artifact
scripts.docs:build: bun run docs:adr:check && bun run --cwd apps/docs build
scripts.lint: oxlint -c .oxlintrc.jsonc apps/*/src packages/*/src scripts tests infra *.ts
scripts.lint:fix: oxlint --fix -c .oxlintrc.jsonc apps/*/src packages/*/src scripts tests infra *.ts
scripts.sync:function:check: bun packages/server/src/cli/generate.ts --check --registry packages/schema/src/registry.ts --export demoMembershipSyncRegistry --project-dir . --config infra/drizzle.config.ts && bun packages/server/src/cli/generate.ts --check --registry packages/board-schema/src/registry.ts --export boardSyncRegistry --project-dir . --config infra/board-drizzle.config.ts
scripts.test:integration: bun run test:integration:contract && bun run test:integration:implementation && bun run test:integration:conformance
scripts.test:unit:fast: bun scripts/run-unit-tests.ts tests/unit/bulk-apply.test.ts tests/unit/apply-fingerprint.test.ts tests/unit/apply-strategy.test.ts tests/unit/client-schema.test.ts tests/unit/concurrent-mutation-mix.test.ts tests/unit/conflict-base-capture.test.ts tests/unit/conflict-handling.test.ts tests/unit/contracts-supabase-rls.test.ts tests/unit/contracts.test.ts tests/unit/convergence.test.ts tests/unit/convergence-model.test.ts tests/unit/demo-rls-schema.test.ts tests/unit/electric-proxy.test.ts tests/unit/generate-cli.test.ts tests/unit/mutation-state.test.ts tests/unit/perf-lab-schema.test.ts tests/unit/perf-scenario.test.ts tests/unit/plpgsql-apply.test.ts tests/unit/public-package-set.test.ts tests/unit/create-payload-validation.test.ts tests/unit/registry-diff.test.ts tests/unit/registry-fingerprint.test.ts tests/unit/row-expectations.test.ts tests/unit/row-filter-shape.test.ts tests/unit/server-shape-proxy.test.ts tests/unit/shape-fold.test.ts tests/unit/shape-inbox.test.ts tests/unit/shape-sync.test.ts tests/unit/sql-identifier.test.ts tests/unit/sync-auth.test.ts tests/unit/board-schema.test.ts tests/unit/react-live-row-remap.test.ts
scripts.typecheck: tsgo --noEmit -p tsconfig.json && tsgo --noEmit -p apps/board/tsconfig.json && tsgo --noEmit -p apps/perf-lab/tsconfig.json
scripts.validate: bun run guard:tmp-files && bun run format && bun run check:fast
scripts.validate:full: bun run guard:tmp-files && bun run format && bun run check
